Solana trading bot signals with proof

Signals are only useful when they are inspectable. SlimeWire connects alerts, scans, wallet activity, charts, Telegram calls, proof, and PnL review.

Open @SlimeWiredBotTrading alerts

What this workflow covers

Fresh signals

Surface fresh pairs and market activity before they go stale.

Wallet activity

Use wallet signals as context, not blind instruction.

Token scans

Attach CA lookup, risk notes, and chart links to signals.

Telegram calls

Give groups readable signal cards and proof paths.

PnL review

Connect outcomes back to positions and receipts.

No guarantees

Signals help review; they do not remove trading risk.

FAQ

What are Solana trading bot signals?

They are alerts or scored context about tokens, wallets, fresh pairs, or market movement that may deserve review.

Should signals include proof?

Yes. Receipts and proof cards help users review whether a signal was useful after the trade window passes.

Are trading bot signals financial advice?

No. Signals are informational and users are responsible for trading decisions.
